languages.text: "Пожалуйста, продолжайте эксперимент, Вольный Торговец. Что есть мучения плоти, если они помогут Поиску Знания, верно? Мы с Нунциусом всегда сможем снабдить вас достойными аугментами в случае утраты конечности или необратимого поражения нервной системы".

"Pray continue your experiment, Rogue Trader. After all, what are the torments of the flesh if they serve the Quest for Knowledge? Nuncius and I can always furnish you with worthy augmetics in the event of loss of limb or irreversible nervous degradation."
languages.original_text: "Пожалуйста, продолжайте эксперимент, Вольный Торговец. Что есть мучения плоти, если они помогут Поиску Знания, верно? Мы с Нунциусом всегда сможем снабдить вас достойными аугментами в случае утраты конечности или необратимого поражения нервной системы".

traits.locale_text: "Pray continue your experiment, Rogue Trader. What are the torments of the flesh if they might serve the Quest for Knowledge, after all? Nuntius and I shall always be able to furnish you with worthy augmentics in the event of limb loss or irreversible neural degradation."

"Pray continue your experiment, Rogue Trader. What are the torments of the flesh if they might serve the Quest for Knowledge, after all? Nuntius and I shall always be able to furnish you with worthy augmentics in the event of limb loss or irreversible neural degradation."

"Pray continue your experiment, Rogue Trader. After all, what are the torments of the flesh if they serve the Quest for Knowledge? Nuncius and I can always furnish you with worthy augmetics in the event of loss of limb or irreversible nervous degradation."

languages.text: "Bitte fahrt mit Eurem Experiment fort, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Was sind schon die Qualen des Fleisches, wenn sie der Suche nach Wissen dienen? Nuncius und ich können Euch jederzeit mit würdigen Augmentationen ausstatten, falls Ihr Gliedmaßen verlieren oder irreparable Nervenschäden erleiden solltet."
languages.original_text: "Pray continue your experiment, Rogue Trader. After all, what are the torments of the flesh if they serve the Quest for Knowledge? Nuncius and I can always furnish you with worthy augmetics in the event of loss of limb or irreversible nervous degradation."

traits.locale_text: "Bitte fahrt mit Eurem Experiment fort, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Was sind schon die Qualen des Fleisches, wenn sie der Suche nach Wissen dienen? Nuncius und ich können Euch jederzeit mit würdigen Augmentationen ausstatten, falls Ihr Gliedmaßen verlieren oder irreparable Nervenschäden erleiden solltet."

languages.text: “请继续您的实验，行商浪人。毕竟，如果能服务于求知远征，肉体的折磨又算得了什么呢？万一您缺失了四肢，或者神经系统遭受了不可逆的损坏，我和努恩修斯随时可以给您配上像样的植入物。”
languages.original_text: "Pray continue your experiment, Rogue Trader. After all, what are the torments of the flesh if they serve the Quest for Knowledge? Nuncius and I can always furnish you with worthy augmetics in the event of loss of limb or irreversible nervous degradation."

traits.locale_text: “请继续您的实验，行商浪人。毕竟，如果能服务于求知远征，肉体的折磨又算得了什么呢？万一您缺失了四肢，或者神经系统遭受了不可逆的损坏，我和努恩修斯随时可以给您配上像样的植入物。”

languages.text: « Poursuivez donc votre expérience, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Après tout, qu'importent les tourments de la chair s'ils servent la Quête de la Connaissance ? Nuncius et moi pourrions vous fournir des augmétiques de qualité si vous deviez perdre un membre ou détruire votre système nerveux de façon irrémédiable. »
languages.original_text: "Pray continue your experiment, Rogue Trader. After all, what are the torments of the flesh if they serve the Quest for Knowledge? Nuncius and I can always furnish you with worthy augmetics in the event of loss of limb or irreversible nervous degradation."

traits.locale_text: « Poursuivez donc votre expérience, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Après tout, qu'importent les tourments de la chair s'ils servent la Quête de la Connaissance ? Nuncius et moi pourrions vous fournir des augmétiques de qualité si vous deviez perdre un membre ou détruire votre système nerveux de façon irrémédiable. »

languages.text: «Por favor, prosiga con su experimento, Comerciante Independiente. Al fin y al cabo, ¿qué suponen los tormentos de la carne si prestan servicio a la búsqueda del conocimiento? Nuncius y yo siempre podemos equiparle con aumentos dignos en caso de que pierda alguna extremidad o sufra un deterioro nervioso irreparable».
languages.original_text: "Pray continue your experiment, Rogue Trader. After all, what are the torments of the flesh if they serve the Quest for Knowledge? Nuncius and I can always furnish you with worthy augmetics in the event of loss of limb or irreversible nervous degradation."

traits.locale_text: «Por favor, prosiga con su experimento, Comerciante Independiente. Al fin y al cabo, ¿qué suponen los tormentos de la carne si prestan servicio a la búsqueda del conocimiento? Nuncius y yo siempre podemos equiparle con aumentos dignos en caso de que pierda alguna extremidad o sufra un deterioro nervioso irreparable».

languages.text: "Lütfen deneyinize devam edin Hür Tacir. Sonuçta İrfan Arayışı'na hizmet ediyorsa bedenin çektiği ıstırabın ne önemi var ki? Uzuv kaybı veya geri döndürülemez sinirsel tahribat durumunda Nuncius ve ben size daima layık ogmetikler temin edebiliriz."
languages.original_text: "Pray continue your experiment, Rogue Trader. After all, what are the torments of the flesh if they serve the Quest for Knowledge? Nuncius and I can always furnish you with worthy augmetics in the event of loss of limb or irreversible nervous degradation."

traits.locale_text: "Lütfen deneyinize devam edin Hür Tacir. Sonuçta İrfan Arayışı'na hizmet ediyorsa bedenin çektiği ıstırabın ne önemi var ki? Uzuv kaybı veya geri döndürülemez sinirsel tahribat durumunda Nuncius ve ben size daima layık ogmetikler temin edebiliriz."

languages.text: 「どうぞ実験をお続けください、ローグトレーダー。なにしろ、知識の探求に資するのであれば、肉体の苦しみなど何ほどのものでしょう？ 四肢の喪失や不可逆的な神経変性が生じた際には、ヌンキウスと私がいつでもふさわしいオーグメティックを用意いたします」
languages.original_text: "Pray continue your experiment, Rogue Trader. After all, what are the torments of the flesh if they serve the Quest for Knowledge? Nuncius and I can always furnish you with worthy augmetics in the event of loss of limb or irreversible nervous degradation."

traits.locale_text: 「どうぞ実験をお続けください、ローグトレーダー。なにしろ、知識の探求に資するのであれば、肉体の苦しみなど何ほどのものでしょう？ 四肢の喪失や不可逆的な神経変性が生じた際には、ヌンキウスと私がいつでもふさわしいオーグメティックを用意いたします」
